tasks.title: Premium Featured Signals UI Component v0
tasks.purpose: Add human-visible Featured Verified Signals UI components for reviewed projects. This is a UI placement layer only. It must not alter machine-readable ranking, sitemap, Public API, future MCP payloads, Signal Score, Source Confidence, or organic ordering.
definition_of_done: Featured Signals are human-visible UI only
eligible projects only: published or claimed/reviewed
external paid links, if any, use rel="sponsored noopener noreferrer"
PR51 can proceed only after human checkpoint

tasks.title: Ad Payment Feature Flag + Commercial Boundary Shell v0
tasks.purpose: Add a disabled commercial/payment boundary shell for Featured Signals. Defaults must be disabled. No live Stripe, no real checkout, no payment links, no secrets, and no automatic campaign activation. Admin review remains required for any future paid state.
forbidden_paths: public SEO/report pages unless task explicitly allows
definition_of_done: checkout route returns disabled Problem Details when flags off
webhook, if included, only updates order status
